events.title: Definition of done
events.content:
Goal: Make the game have 2.5 effects and superpowers and a store
Required checks:
- [ ] Every changed file can be read back after the edit.
- [ ] The final workspace diff or status is inspected before completion.
- [ ] Verification command passes: go test ./... (`go test ./...`)
Forbidden changes: .git, .env, .env.*, .ephemera/secrets
